summary: Comprehensive testing of Star Citizen Fleet Manager with LIVE API integration. All requested features verified working. Backend: 33/33 tests passed. Frontend: All critical flows working with LIVE data from api.star-citizen.wiki.

issues: 82/178 weapons have prices displayed (some from live API don't have price data)
176/333 components have prices displayed (some from live API don't have price data)

passed_tests: Login flow: email=test@test.com, token=testtoken123 works correctly
Ships page: 276 ships from LIVE API (source=live verified)
Ships page: Crew format shows as 'min-max' (e.g., 1-1) from live API
Ships page: ~97 ships have wiki images from starcitizen.tools
Ships page: Search filter works
Ships page: Manufacturer filter works
Ship detail page: Hero image, crew, cargo, speed, shield HP all displayed
Compare page: Nav bar 'Compare' link works
Compare page: Can add ships via modal with search
Compare page: Side-by-side table with stat bars
Compare page: Best values highlighted in green
Compare page: Can add up to 5 ships (shows count 3/5)
Compare page: Remove ship buttons (X) work
Compare page: Clear All button present
Weapons page: 178 weapons from LIVE API (source=live verified)
Weapons page: Real locations displayed (CenterMass Area 18, Shop Ashland, etc.)
Weapons page: aUEC prices displayed where available
Weapons page: Size filter works (Size 1: 37 weapons)
Weapons page: Type filter works (Energy: 123 weapons)
Components page: 333 components from LIVE API (source=live verified)
Components page: Real locations displayed (Dumper's GrimHEX, Platinum CRU-L1, etc.)
Components page: aUEC prices displayed where available
Components page: Type filter works (Shield: 72, Power: 87, Quantum: 62)
Components page: Size filter works (Size 1: 115 components)
Vehicles page: 13 ground vehicles from LIVE API with images
Dashboard: 276 ships, 13 vehicles, 333 components, 178 weapons stats
Dashboard: Featured ships display with images and crew format
Fleet page: Add ship to fleet works (toast notification)
Fleet page: Shows ships with images and stats
Fleet page: Remove from fleet button available
critical_code_review_comments: Some weapons/components from live API don't have price data (cost_auec=0) - this is expected as live API data may be incomplete
seed_data_creation: Previous test data (TEST Pytest Ship, TEST Verify Ship) still present in fleet
context_for_next_testing_agent: LIVE API integration from api.star-citizen.wiki fully working. Backend returns source='live' for ships (276), weapons (178), components (333), and vehicles (13). Compare page supports up to 5 ships with search, stat bars, and best value highlighting. All filters (size, type, manufacturer) work. Ship images from starcitizen.tools wiki.

live_api_data_summary.ships: 276 vehicles (289 total, 13 ground vehicles filtered out)
live_api_data_summary.weapons: 178 weapons with real locations and prices from live API
live_api_data_summary.components: 333 components with types (Shield, Power, Cooler, Quantum, Radar)
